allow: Bash(node -e "eval\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/c/CodeBase/Article/assets/js/series.js','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Series count:', SERIES.length\); console.log\('Total articles:', SERIES.reduce\(\(s,x\)=>s+x.parts,0\)\); const sec = SERIES.find\(s=>s.id==='Security'\); console.log\('Security parts:', sec.parts, 'articles:', sec.articles.length\);")
